title: leontodon sublyratus
intro: Leontodon sublyratus, also known as the Hoary Hawkbit, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have various health benefits such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Leontodon sublyratus can be prepared as a herbal infusion, often in the form of a tea, or as a tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs in folk remedies.
